testcase.name: test_profitability_summary_values
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_profitability_features.py:28: in setup assert login_resp.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {login_resp.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"error":"Rate limit exceeded: 5 per 1 minute"} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
